tasks.title: Verified No Active Matches Remain Before DC kick start
tasks.description: Confirm that no active matches remain before the DC kick start begins.

tasks.title: All DC Matches Selling Started
tasks.description: Verify that selling has started for all DC matches.

tasks.title: All TRN Pool Odds Ready for Verification
tasks.description: Confirm that all TRN pool odds are ready and available for verification.

tasks.title: All TRN Pool Odds Verification Completed
tasks.description: Mark that all TRN pool odds verification has been completed.

tasks.title: Ready for Bet Placement
tasks.description: System is ready for bet placement to begin.

tasks.title: Day 1 1st Batch of Bet Placement by Callibrator Completed
tasks.description: The first batch of bet placements by the Callibrator for Day 1 has been completed.

tasks.title: All Matches Selling Stopped
tasks.description: Selling has been stopped for all matches.

tasks.title: Day 1 Inplay Match(es) entered Inplay and Ready for Bet Placement
tasks.description: All Day 1 inplay matches have entered inplay status and are ready for bet placement.

tasks.title: Day 1 2nd Batch of Bet Placement by Callibrator Completed
tasks.description: The second batch of bet placements by the Callibrator for Day 1 has been completed.

tasks.title: All Day 1 Matches Kicked Off and Ready for Early Settlement
tasks.description: All Day 1 matches have kicked off and are ready for early settlement processing.

tasks.title: Day 1 Early Settlement Completed
tasks.description: Early settlement for Day 1 has been completed.

tasks.title: All Day 1 Matches Settled
tasks.description: All Day 1 matches have been fully settled.
